links.evidence: The background circle uses fill="#FF1D1D", a saturated red, filling the entire 32x32 viewBox.
The paw-pad path and three toe circles use fill="#FFF5F5", a soft off-white, contrasting against the red background.

SVG is a 32x32 circular badge containing a heart-shaped pad (path element) with three small circles positioned above it like toe pads, forming a classic paw-print silhouette rendered in near-white on a solid red circular background.
File is located at app/icon.svg, the Next.js App Router convention for the site's favicon/app icon, implying it is the icon representing the Bougie Poodle site/brand.
A paw-print motif as the site favicon strongly suggests a dog/pet-themed brand identity, consistent with the repository and project being named 'THE BOUGIE POODLE'.
